channel.title: Math-Reasoning on TinyWeights.dev
channel.description: Recent content in Math-Reasoning on TinyWeights.dev

item.title: How to Run Phi-4-mini-reasoning Locally: Microsoft's 3.8B Math Model
item.description: Step-by-step guide to running Phi-4-mini-reasoning locally with Ollama and llama.cpp: Microsoft's 3.8B model that outscores 7B distillation models on AIME and MATH-500.
